name: Use filepath.Join for Path Construction
description: Building file paths by concatenating strings with + or fmt.Sprintf is fragile and platform-dependent. Use filepath.Join instead.
rationale: String concatenation does not handle path separators correctly across platforms and may introduce path traversal vulnerabilities. filepath.Join ensures cross-platform correctness.
noncompliant_code:
path := dir + "/" + filename
full := fmt.Sprintf("%s/%s", base, name)
compliant_code:
path := filepath.Join(dir, filename)
full := filepath.Join(base, name)
